ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee joined the organization */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the organization (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job title or position of the employee */,
  "office" TEXT /* Location of the employee's office */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, terminated, on leave) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_title"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office FOREIGN KEY ("office") REFERENCES offices ("office_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the position is located */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary for the position */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills and qualifications required for the position */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office location */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the office */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of employees the office can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name or ID of the employee who heads the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the salary record */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this salary was effective */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Information about employee benefits */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user within the HR system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who conducted the review */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
